title: As stocks and bonds fall, and oil hits $100, a futures trade that boomed in 2022 may again be a winner
summary_full: Managed futures, which track macro themes expected to play out over months, do well when traditional assets are falling. This could be one of those times.
summary_public: Managed futures, which track macro themes expected to play out over months, do well when traditional assets are falling. This could be one of those times.
